title: N-PAMP TLV-Tag Registry
description: Schema for the JSON representation of registries/tlv_tags.csv: an array of row objects. The tag column is EITHER a single 8-bit tag (0x01), a single 16-bit tag, OR an inclusive range of two 16-bit tags (0x8000-0xFFFF); accepted via oneOf. The length column is 'var', a non-negative integer as a decimal string, or '--' (for the reserved extension range). Wrong-format tag, bad length token, missing column, and empty name/description are caught here; DUPLICATE / OVERLAPPING tag values are caught by the companion validate-registries.py.

oneOf.description: Inclusive range low-high of two 16-bit tags (e.g. 0x8000-0xFFFF).

tag.description: A single 8-bit or 16-bit TLV tag, or an inclusive low-high range of two 16-bit tags.

name.description: TLV name or (reserved) marker; MUST be non-empty.

length.description: Value length in octets: 'var' (variable), a non-negative decimal integer, or '--' (not applicable, reserved range).
